data.title: TBS Holdings Director Resigns Over Fraudulent Expense Claims
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks This Holiday Season

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from TBS HOLDINGS INC. ( (JP:9401) ) is now available.

TBS HOLDINGS, INC. announced that Managing Director Shigetoshi Ida resigned effective December 25, 2025, after an internal investigation found he had fraudulently claimed reimbursements for entertainment expenses and he agreed to refund the amounts retroactively. The company characterized the misconduct as a serious breach of trust with stakeholders, issued an apology, and pledged to prevent any recurrence by further strengthening its corporate governance framework, signaling an effort to contain reputational damage and restore confidence in its management controls.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:9401) stock is a Buy with a Yen6472.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on TBS HOLDINGS INC. stock, see the JP:9401 Stock Forecast page.

More about TBS HOLDINGS INC.

TBS HOLDINGS, INC. is a Japan-based media group listed on the Prime Market of the Tokyo Stock Exchange, operating primarily in broadcasting and related content and communications businesses serving viewers and advertisers in the domestic market.

Average Trading Volume: 210,852

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen945.1B

data.title: Crisil Reaffirms Finkurve’s BBB/Stable Rating as Bank Debt Limit Raised to Rs 300 Crore
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks This Holiday Season

  • Unlock hedge-fund level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Finkurve Financial Services Ltd. ( (IN:FINKURVE) ) has issued an update.

Finkurve Financial Services Ltd has had its long-term credit rating of ‘Crisil BBB/Stable’ reaffirmed by Crisil Ratings, alongside an enhancement in the rated bank loan facilities to Rs 300 crore from Rs 200 crore and reaffirmation of ratings on two Rs 100 crore non-convertible debenture issues. The rating reflects the company’s adequate capitalisation, bolstered by a recent Rs 111.5 crore equity infusion that lifted net worth to Rs 329 crore and kept gearing at a moderate 1.1 times, as well as a comfortable earnings profile and strong promoter backing. Crisil notes that these strengths are tempered by Finkurve’s relatively small scale, limited portfolio seasoning and modest funding profile, but the reaffirmation and increased borrowing headroom support the company’s capacity to expand its gold-loan-focused franchise while maintaining a steady risk profile for lenders and debenture holders.

More about Finkurve Financial Services Ltd.

Finkurve Financial Services Ltd, which operates under the Arvog brand, is a non-banking financial company (NBFC) that focuses primarily on gold-backed lending and retail finance. Part of the Augmont bullion group, the company leverages the group’s integrated gold ecosystem to offer gold loans, personal loans and SME loans, with gold loans constituting about 91% of its Rs 671 crore assets under management as of September 30, 2025. Its operations have evolved from fintech-led retail lending partnerships to directly sourced and managed gold loans through its own branch network, supported by an experienced promoter group and professional management team.

Average Trading Volume: 9,526

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: 14.67B INR

Learn more about FINKURVE stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: NAC to Absorb Yesmart Subsidiary in Streamlining, Brand-Unification Merger
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks This Holiday Season

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

NAC Co., Ltd. ( (JP:9788) ) just unveiled an announcement.

NAC Co., Ltd. has decided to absorb its wholly owned subsidiary Nac Yesmart Co., Ltd., which handles the import and sale of Korean food products, through an absorption-type merger effective March 1, 2026, with NAC as the surviving entity. The move consolidates the Yesmart supermarket business—originally spun off from acquired subsidiary CONVEBOX, INC.—back into the parent to eliminate operational overlaps between NAC and Nac Yesmart, streamline group management, and unify the Yesmart brand strategy. As the transaction is a simplified and short-form merger involving a wholly owned subsidiary, no merger consideration will be paid and no shareholder meetings will be held, while NAC plans to resolve Nac Yesmart’s negative net worth via a capital increase before completion, aiming to improve economic rationality and operational efficiency in its growing Korean food retail business.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:9788) stock is a Buy with a Yen603.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on NAC Co., Ltd. stock, see the JP:9788 Stock Forecast page.

More about NAC Co., Ltd.

NAC Co., Ltd., listed on the TSE Prime Market, operates a diversified portfolio of services including production and sale of bottled water with dispensers, rental and sale of dust control products as a Duskin franchise, pest control equipment, and consulting services for small and medium-sized enterprises. The company, founded in 1971 and headquartered in Tokyo, has a significant shareholder base including Duskin Co., Ltd. and YAMADA HOLDINGS CO., LTD., and has recently expanded into the Korean food retail segment through its Yesmart brand.

Average Trading Volume: 33,518

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen23.49B

See more insights into 9788 stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Kanamoto Reshapes Top Management With Broad Executive Promotions and Role Realignments
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks This Holiday Season

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Kanamoto Co ( (JP:9678) ) has provided an update.

Kanamoto Co., Ltd. has approved a broad set of executive personnel changes, effective January 22, 2026, pending shareholder approval at the upcoming regular general meeting. Several directors and corporate officers, including Tatsuo Kanamoto, Akira Sannomiya, Jun Watanabe, Shun Hirose, and Hideaki Yamashita, will be promoted to Director and Senior Corporate Officer roles while maintaining or expanding their responsibilities across key divisions such as steel sales, human resources, construction equipment rental, accounting, public relations, overseas business, used products sales, and group company leadership. In addition, multiple corporate officers, including those overseeing internal control, DX strategy, administration, affiliated business, and business development, will be elevated to Senior Corporate Officer positions, and a new Standing Corporate Auditor will be appointed, reflecting a consolidation of leadership and governance across Kanamoto’s domestic and overseas operations and its group companies. These moves indicate a strategic strengthening of the management structure, with a focus on reinforcing core business divisions, digital transformation, internal controls, and group coordination, which may enhance operational efficiency and support the company’s growth initiatives in its construction-related and international markets.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:9678) stock is a Buy with a Yen4500.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Kanamoto Co stock, see the JP:9678 Stock Forecast page.

More about Kanamoto Co

Kanamoto Co., Ltd. is a Japan-based company listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Prime Market and the Sapporo Stock Exchange under stock code 9678. The company operates primarily in construction-related businesses, including construction equipment rental, steel sales, used equipment sales, and overseas operations, supported by affiliated companies such as Kanatech Co., Ltd., KG Flowtechno Co., Ltd., NISHIKEN CO., LTD., and Unite Co., Ltd.

Average Trading Volume: 96,114

Current Market Cap: Yen148.2B

data.title: Shoei Foods Lifts Dividend as Sales Grow and Profit Guidance Improves for FY2026
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks This Holiday Season

  • Unlock hedge-fund level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Shoei Foods Corporation ( (JP:8079) ) is now available.

Shoei Foods Corporation reported an 8.4% rise in net sales to ¥124.9 billion for the fiscal year ended 31 October 2025, while operating profit edged up 2.0% to ¥4.94 billion and ordinary profit was broadly flat. Profit attributable to owners of the parent slipped 4.2% to ¥3.04 billion, weighing on earnings per share, even as comprehensive income jumped 28.9%, and the equity ratio declined modestly to 56.7% amid an expansion of total assets to ¥96.6 billion. Cash flow from operating activities turned negative, but was offset by positive financing cash flows, keeping year-end cash and cash equivalents roughly stable. Reflecting confidence in its earnings base, the company lifted its annual dividend for FY2025 to ¥60 per share and is planning a further increase to ¥90 per share for FY2026, implying a higher payout to shareholders. For the year ending October 2026, Shoei Foods is guiding for continued top-line growth to ¥130.0 billion and an 11.9% increase in profit attributable to owners of the parent to ¥3.4 billion, signaling expectations of gradual margin improvement and reinforcing its commitment to shareholder returns.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:8079) stock is a Hold with a Yen4355.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Shoei Foods Corporation stock, see the JP:8079 Stock Forecast page.

More about Shoei Foods Corporation

Shoei Foods Corporation is a Japan-based food company listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange that operates under Japanese GAAP. The group is engaged in the manufacturing, processing and trading of food products, with a portfolio that typically spans nuts, dried fruits and other food ingredients for retail and industrial customers in domestic and overseas markets.

Average Trading Volume: 44,959

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: Yen68.34B

data.title: Aichi Financial Group Reshapes Director Roles to Elevate Leasing Business
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks This Holiday Season

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Aichi Financial Group, Inc. ( (JP:7389) ) is now available.

Aichi Financial Group has announced changes to the division of duties among its directors, effective January 1, 2026, as part of a broader organizational realignment. Director and Managing Executive Officer Kenji Ito will newly oversee the Group Corporate Planning Department and Group Sustainability Management Department and serve as chairman of the leasing subsidiary, which will be renamed Aichi FG Lease Co., Ltd. on January 5, 2026, while Director and Executive Officer Takehiro Suzuki, already serving as Representative Director, President and Executive Officer, will take on responsibility for the Group Corporate Planning and Group Sustainability Management departments as well. The company states that these changes are aimed at strengthening its organizational structure and advancing its strategy of becoming a “Total Support Group that goes Beyond Banking” by placing top executives directly in charge of the leasing business, underscoring the strategic importance of leasing to its overall growth and service offering.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:7389) stock is a Buy with a Yen5074.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Aichi Financial Group, Inc. stock, see the JP:7389 Stock Forecast page.

More about Aichi Financial Group, Inc.

Aichi Financial Group, Inc. is a Japanese financial holding company listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Prime Market and the Nagoya Stock Exchange Premier Market, providing banking and related financial services to customers in its regional and broader markets. The group’s operations include leasing activities through its subsidiary leasing company, reflecting a strategy to offer comprehensive financial solutions that extend beyond traditional banking services.

Average Trading Volume: 168,360

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen229.4B

data.title: Seibu Holdings to Retire 5.47% of Outstanding Shares in Capital Optimization Move
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks This Holiday Season

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Seibu Holdings, Inc. ( (JP:9024) ).

Seibu Holdings Inc. has announced that its Board of Directors has resolved to retire 17,687,400 shares of its common stock, equivalent to 5.47% of its total issued shares prior to the retirement, under Article 178 of the Companies Act of Japan. The share cancellation, scheduled for January 22, 2026, will reduce the company’s total number of issued shares to 305,775,520, a move that is likely aimed at optimizing capital structure and may enhance shareholder value by increasing the relative ownership stakes of remaining shareholders.

data.title: Heiwado Posts Higher Revenue but Lower Nine-Month Profit While Maintaining Dividend and Guidance
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks This Holiday Season

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

HEIWADO CO ( (JP:8276) ) has provided an announcement.

Heiwado reported a 3.0% year-on-year increase in operating revenue to ¥335.9 billion for the nine months ended November 20, 2025, with operating profit and ordinary profit edging up 1.8% and 1.4%, respectively, while profit attributable to owners of parent declined 10.7% to ¥5.9 billion, resulting in lower earnings per share. The company’s financial position remained stable with total assets roughly flat at about ¥307.8 billion and an equity ratio of 61.7%, and it maintained its dividend policy with an increased interim dividend and a full-year forecast of ¥66 per share; full-year guidance was left unchanged, projecting modest revenue and profit growth, signaling steady but subdued earnings momentum for shareholders.

More about HEIWADO CO

Heiwado Co., Ltd. is a Japanese retailer listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange, operating primarily in the general merchandise and supermarket sector. The company focuses on serving regional consumer markets with a broad range of daily necessities and related retail services under a consolidated management structure.

UNITED ARROWS LTD. ( (JP:7606) ) has shared an update.

UNITED ARROWS LTD. has postponed the scheduled execution date of the share transfer agreement to sell all shares of its consolidated subsidiary COEN CO., LTD. to Gyet Co., Ltd., citing the need for additional time to finalize terms, and will announce a revised schedule once determined. data.title: Hachijuni Bank Secures Approval to Merge with Nagano Bank and Launch Hachijuni Nagano Bank
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks This Holiday Season

  • Unlock hedge-fund level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Hachijuni Bank ( (JP:8359) ) has shared an announcement.

The Hachijuni Bank has obtained regulatory approval under the Banking Act to merge with its wholly owned subsidiary, The Nagano Bank, on January 1, 2026, after which the integrated entity will begin operations as Hachijuni Nagano Bank, Ltd. The merged bank will be headquartered at Hachijuni Bank’s current Nagano City address, led by President Masaki Matsushita, and will have capital of ¥52.2 billion, combined deposits of ¥9,522.0 billion, loans of ¥6,577.6 billion, a workforce of 3,957 employees and 117 domestic branches, marking a significant consolidation of regional banking operations that is expected to reinforce its scale and competitiveness in the local financial market.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:8359) stock is a Buy with a Yen1816.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Hachijuni Bank stock, see the JP:8359 Stock Forecast page.

More about Hachijuni Bank

The Hachijuni Bank, Ltd. is a regional financial institution based in Nagano Prefecture, Japan, operating in the banking industry with a focus on deposit-taking, lending and related financial services. Through its wholly owned subsidiary The Nagano Bank, Ltd., the group serves retail and corporate customers primarily in its home region, and following their integration aims to strengthen its position as a leading regional bank.
